description_long: This object consists of three distinct framed mirrors of varying sizes and shapes, each with ornate, gold-toned frames featuring decorative patterns. The largest mirror is tall and rectangular, with a detailed floral motif along its border, and a reflective surface that appears slightly antiqued or frosted at the bottom. The medium-sized mirror is square with a simpler, yet still decorative, gold frame. The smallest mirror is rectangular and features a more intricate, beaded frame design. All three mirrors have flat backs and thin profiles, suggesting they are designed to be mounted or placed against a surface. The reflective surfaces show some signs of aging or intentional antiquing, giving them a vintage or classic appearance. These mirrors would likely be used as decorative accents in urban interiors, such as entryways, hallways, or living rooms.
description: A set of three ornate, gold-framed mirrors in varying sizes, each with decorative patterns and slightly antiqued reflective surfaces. The mirrors have a vintage, classic look suitable for elegant urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three mirrors' ornate gold frames and reflective surfaces, with visible decorative patterns and antiqued effects.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profiles of the mirrors, emphasizing their flatness and frame thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the plain, unadorned backs of the mirrors, with no visible mounting hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlighting the slimness of the mirrors and the layered frame construction.
attribute_frame_design: Ornate gold-toned frames with decorative floral and beaded patterns, rectangular and square shapes, classic vintage style.
attribute_reflective_quality: slightly distorted, antiqued, with some frosted areas
